why_brow_tint.title: Why Brow Tint Exists
why_brow_tint.label: Our Story
why_brow_tint.description: Brow tinting is having a moment — but salon visits cost money, results are semi-permanent, and you only see the look after it's already done. We built Brow Tint so you can experiment with eyebrow color the way you experiment with hair color in your head: freely, privately, without commitment.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions About Brow Tinting
faq.description: Common questions about brow tinting, brow lamination, and how Brow Tint helps you preview before you book.
faq.tip: Can't find what you're looking for? Contact our support team

items.question: What is brow tinting?
items.answer: Brow tinting is a semi-permanent dye treatment that adds color, depth, and shape definition to your eyebrows. Standard professional brow tint typically lasts 4–6 weeks before fading naturally. Tinted brow gel and brow lamination are related treatments — explore the differences in our brow lamination and tint guide.

items.question: Why preview brow tinting before going to the salon?
items.answer: Brow tint is semi-permanent — once it's applied, you live with the result for weeks. Previewing the look on your own photo before the appointment lets you commit only to a shade you've actually seen on your face, and gives your brow artist a clear visual reference instead of a verbal description.

items.question: Who is Brow Tint for?
items.answer: Anyone considering brow tinting, brow lamination, tinted brow gel, or lash and brow tint — from first-time tinters to experienced brow artists prepping client consultations. Beauty bloggers, photographers, and event planners also use Brow Tint to coordinate looks ahead of shoots and events.

items.question: Is Brow Tint a salon, a product, or a tool?
items.answer: Brow Tint is a free online AI eyebrow color studio. We don't sell tints or run salons — we help you decide which tint to choose and where to get it done. Take your downloaded preview to any brow artist or salon.

items.question: How accurate are Brow Tint previews?
items.answer: Our GPT Image 2 model produces photorealistic previews that brow artists worldwide use as a consultation reference. Accuracy depends on photo quality — front-facing photos with good lighting and visible eyebrows produce the best results. See real examples in our brow tint before and after gallery.

items.question: Is my photo private?
items.answer: Yes. Photos are processed securely and deleted automatically after generation. We never share, sell, or train AI models on uploaded photos.

items.question: Is Brow Tint really free?
items.answer: Yes. Free trial with no signup required. Premium plans unlock more styles, higher resolution downloads, unlimited generations, and priority AI processing.

items.question: What happens after I generate a preview?
items.answer: Download your preview and take it to any brow artist or salon — or browse our showcased looks for inspiration. The image speaks louder than any description, and helps your artist deliver the exact result you want.
